data.title: Security Council freezes $71.5M in Ethereum from $292M KelpDAO exploit. Arbitrum faces mixed reactions for emergency response.
data.description: Arbitrum's swift actions following the KelpDAO exploit have provoked both admiration and skepticism in response to the platform's capacity to halt the misappropriated funds. The move has stirred discussions within the community regarding the effectiveness of such emergency measures.

data.title: Mantle Confirms Full Network Security and Coordinates Recovery With Aave, Including Potential Treasury Participation Following rsETH by KelpDAO Incident
data.description: In Dubai, UAE on April 21, 2026, Mantle, a leading distribution layer that bridges traditional finance and on-chain liquidity, confirmed the continued security of its network and core infrastructure. The company is collaborating with Aave and other impacted protocols to address any issues.

data.title: d-wise Appoints 2x-CEO, ex-Labcorp Head of Software Solutions to Drive Next Phase of Strategy & Growth
data.description: In Boston, d-wise (an Instem company) revealed the hiring of Christine Oliver as its new President. With more than 20 years of experience in clinical technology, she previously held the position of CEO at Beaconcure, an AI firm specializing in automating clinical data validation in biometrics. Oliver also served as CEO at endpoint Clinical, a prominent player in the randomization market. This appointment signifies a strategic move for d-wise, strengthening its leadership team with Oliver's extensive expertise in the field.

data.title: Global Green Ammonia Market Forecast to Hit USD 18.3 Billion by 2036: Regional Growth Trends in USA, UK, Japan, India Led by Nutrien Ltd. & Siemens Energy
data.description: In Newark, Delaware, a recent market analysis by Future Market Insights reveals significant growth in the global green ammonia market amid a transition towards low-carbon production and renewable energy adoption. The market for green ammonia is experiencing robust momentum worldwide, with key industries increasingly embracing sustainable practices. This growth is driven by the rising demand for environmentally friendly solutions, with the global market showing promising trends.

data.title: Kering Board of Directors sees new members joining, bringing change to the team.
data.description: A recent report indicated that the unemployment rate has dropped to 4.5%, the lowest in five years. The number of new jobs created in the last month reached 250,000, surpassing experts' expectations. Additionally, the average hourly wage increased by 3.2% compared to last year. This positive trend in the job market is a promising sign of economic growth and stability.
